name: Uptown Supper Salad
recipeIngredient: boneless and skinless, cut into 1/3-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat, cook potatoes covered in 2 inches of boiling water for 5 minutes.
2. Add chicken; bring to boil, reduce heat, cover and cook about 10 more minutes until potatoes are tender and juices run clear when chicken is pierced.
3. Drain thoroughly.
4. Add remaining ingredients (except lettuce and cheese) to the mixture of potatoes and chicken.
5. Toss gently over low heat just until warm.
6. Line a platter with lettuce leaves.
7. Spoon the mixture onto the lettuce.
8. Top with crumbled blue cheese.
(Alternatively, the salad can be served chilled.)
